# Frontend Templates

This directory contains domain-specialist templates focused on frontend/UI constraints.

## Available Templates

- [`AGENT_SPEC.template.md`](./AGENT_SPEC.template.md) -> `docs/agents/frontend/AGENT_SPEC.md`
  - Frontend Specialist Agent role specification

Use these when your target project needs a persistent frontend specialist role with:

- UI invariants
- accessibility constraints
- layout or motion guardrails
- visual system policy

If your project does not need persistent frontend truth yet, you can leave this directory unused.
